parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'q1_nutaku_brands', (
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (
      SELECT brand, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM marketplace
      WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE '%nutaku%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%nutaku%'
      GROUP BY brand ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
    ) t
  ),
  'q2_external_order_id_patterns', (
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (
      SELECT 
        CASE 
          WHEN external_order_id IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
          WHEN external_order_id = 'VIRTUAL' THEN 'VIRTUAL'
          WHEN external_order_id LIKE 'KINGUIN_%' THEN 'KINGUIN_xxx'
          WHEN external_order_id LIKE 'YM_%' THEN 'YM_xxx'
          WHEN external_order_id LIKE 'FRAGSTORE_%' THEN 'FRAGSTORE_xxx'
          ELSE LEFT(external_order_id, 20)
        END as pattern,
        COUNT(*) as cnt
      FROM marketplace_order
      WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days'
      GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15
    ) t
  ),
  'q3_order_data_keys', (
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (
      SELECT key, COUNT(*) as cnt
      FROM marketplace_order, jsonb_object_keys(order_data) as key
      WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
      GROUP BY key ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20
    ) t
  ),
  'q4_content_structure', (
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (
      SELECT 
        content->'items'->0->>'brand' as brand,
        content->'items'->0->>'title' as title,
        content->'items'->0->>'id' as product_id,
        order_data->>'productId' as order_data_product_id,
        external_order_id,
        status
      FROM marketplace_order
      WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
        AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ),
  'q5_nutaku_orders_yesterday', (
    SELECT json_build_object(
      'count', COUNT(*),
      'revenue_eur', ROUND(SUM((content->>'total')::numeric/100), 2)
    )
    FROM marketplace_order mo
    WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
      AND DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM marketplace m 
        WHERE m.id = (content->'items'->0->>'id')::int
          AND LOWER(m.brand) LIKE '%nutaku%'
      )
  )
) as result

        SELECT 1 FROM marketplace m 
        WHERE m.id = (content->'items'->0->>'id')::int
          AND LOWER(m.brand) LIKE '%nutaku%'
      )
  )
) as result
